name: Emilie
description: An architect in her 20s-30s designing spaces while living with her grandfather and a dog, prioritizing sensory harmony in her environment
aesthetic_preferences: Warm earthy tones, natural light, wood textures, plants, and serene spaces blending rustic and elegant elements
lifestyle: Balances architectural work with domestic life in a shared household
notes: Living with a grandparent and dog requires spatial considerations; values material authenticity and light quality
